#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""AstroHub E2E æĩčŊ"""

import json
import time
import sys
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, Page

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:10280"
results = {"passed": [], "failed": []}

# åĻæč·åįæŽå·
def get_version():
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/version", timeout=5) as resp:
            data = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
            return data.get("version", "unknown")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Warning: Failed to fetch version: {e}")
        return "unknown"

VERSION = get_version()

def log_result(category, test_name, success, detail=""):
    entry = {"category": category, "test": test_name, "detail": detail}
    if success:
        results["passed"].append(entry)
        print(f"[PASS] [{category}] {test_name}")
    else:
        results["failed"].append(entry)
        print(f"[FAIL] [{category}] {test_name}: {detail}")

def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print(f"AstroHub {VERSION} E2E Test (Clean Build)")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    Path("test_results").mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        page = browser.new_page(viewport={"width": 1920, "height": 1080})
        
        try:
            # ========== 1. éĶéĄĩå č―― ==========
            print("\n[1. Home Page]")
            page.goto(BASE_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=15000)
            time.sleep(2)
            log_result("Home", "Page Load", True)
            
            # įæŽå·
            version = page.locator(".version")
            if version.count() > 0:
                ver_text = version.text_content()
                log_result("Home", "Version Display", VERSION in ver_text, ver_text)
            else:
                log_result("Home", "Version Display", False, "not found")
            
            page.screenshot(path="test_results/01_home.png")
            
            # ========== 2. åŊžčŠæéŪ ==========
            print("\n[2. Navigation]")
            nav_buttons = [
                ("äŧŠčĄĻį", "dashboard"),
                ("čŪūåĪįŪĄį", "devices"),
                ("äļŧæ§å°", "console"),
                ("č§æĩčŪĄå", "observation"),
                ("éŦįš§åč―", "advanced"),
                ("åæū", "replay"),
            ]
            
            for name, page_id in nav_buttons:
                btn = page.locator(f"[data-page='{page_id}']")
                log_result("Nav", name, btn.count() > 0)
            
            # ========== 3. čŪūåĪįŪĄį ==========
            print("\n[3. Device Management]")
            page.click("[data-page='devices']")
            time.sleep(1)
            
            table = page.locator("table")
            log_result("Devices", "Table", table.count() > 0)
            
            discover_btn = page.locator("button:has-text('åį°'), button:has-text('æįīĒ')")
            log_result("Devices", "Discover Button", discover_btn.count() > 0)
            
            quick_switch = page.locator("#quickConnectSwitch")
            log_result("Devices", "Quick Connect Switch", quick_switch.count() > 0)
            
            page.screenshot(path="test_results/02_devices.png")
            
            # ========== 4. äļŧæ§å° ==========
            print("\n[4. Console Page]")
            page.click("[data-page='console']")
            time.sleep(1)
            
            ptz_section = page.locator("#ptzControlSection")
            log_result("Console", "PTZ Section", ptz_section.count() > 0)
            
            # PTZ æđåæéŪ
            directions = ["up", "down", "left", "right"]
            ptz_btns = sum(1 for d in directions if page.locator(f"[onmousedown*=\"ptzMove('{d}'\"]").count() > 0)
            log_result("Console", "PTZ Buttons", ptz_btns >= 4, f"{ptz_btns}/4")
            
            # éĒį―Ūįđ
            preset_select = page.locator("#ptzPresetSelect")
            log_result("Console", "Preset Select", preset_select.count() > 0)
            
            preset_btns = ["ååū", "äŋå­", "å―ä―"]
            for btn_text in preset_btns:
                btn = page.locator(f"button:has-text('{btn_text}')")
                log_result("Console", f"Preset: {btn_text}", btn.count() > 0)
            
            # åįĶ/åŊđįĶ
            zoom_in = page.locator("[onmousedown*=\"ptzZoom('in'\"]")
            log_result("Console", "Zoom Buttons", zoom_in.count() > 0)
            
            focus_near = page.locator("[onmousedown*=\"ptzFocus('near'\"]")

            focus_mode = page.locator("#focusMode")

            # č·čļŠæ§åķ
            track_section = page.locator("#trackControlSection")
            log_result("Console", "Track Section", track_section.count() > 0)
            
            track_btns = ["ææč·čļŠ", "æįč·čļŠ", "åĪŠéģč·čļŠ", "åģé­č·čļŠ"]
            for btn_text in track_btns:

            # č§éĒåŪđåĻ

            # åŠä―æä―

            # Live Stack

            # įŧéĒæ§åķ
            image_section = page.locator("#imageControlSection")
            log_result("Console", "Image Control Section", image_section.count() > 0)
            
            page.screenshot(path="test_results/03_console.png")
            
            # ========== 5. įŧéĒæ§åķčŊĶįŧ ==========
            print("\n[5. Image Controls]")
            
            # åąåžįŧéĒæ§åķ
            image_header = page.locator("#imageControlSection .collapsible-header")
            if image_header.count() > 0:
                image_header.click()
                time.sleep(0.5)
            
            sliders = [
                ("äšŪåšĶ", "consoleBrightness"),
                ("åŊđæŊåšĶ", "consoleContrast"),

            for name, slider_id in sliders:

            wb_mode = page.locator("#wbMode")

            wb_red = page.locator("#wbRed")

            log_result("Image", "WB Blue Slider", wb_blue.count() > 0)
            
            dnr_spatial = page.locator("#dnrSpatial")

            exposure_mode = page.locator("#exposureMode")

            shutter = page.locator("#shutterSpeed")

            iris = page.locator("#irisLevel")
            log_result("Image", "Iris Select", iris.count() > 0)
            
            gain = page.locator("#gainLevel")

            info_osd = page.locator("#infoOsdSwitch")
            ptz_osd = page.locator("#ptzOsdSwitch")
            log_result("Image", "Info OSD Switch", info_osd.count() > 0)
            log_result("Image", "PTZ OSD Switch", ptz_osd.count() > 0)
            
            page.screenshot(path="test_results/04_image.png")
            
            # ========== 6. éŦįš§åč― ==========
            print("\n[6. Advanced Features]")
            page.click("[data-page='advanced']")
            time.sleep(1)
            
            test_items = ["åč―æĩčŊ", "éä―æĩčŊ", "éåšĶæĩčŊ", "æĻæĩ/å­åĻ", "åĪĐææ Ąå"]
            for item in test_items:
                btn = page.locator(f".adv-menu-item:has-text('{item}')")
                log_result("Advanced", f"Menu: {item}", btn.count() > 0)
            
            run_btn = page.locator("#btnAdvRun")
            stop_btn = page.locator("#btnAdvStop")
            log_result("Advanced", "Run Button", run_btn.count() > 0)
            log_result("Advanced", "Stop Button", stop_btn.count() > 0)
            
            video_box = page.locator("#advVideoBox")
            log_result("Advanced", "Video Box", video_box.count() > 0)
            
            output = page.locator("#advOutput")

            log_result("Advanced", "Result Area", result.count() > 0)
            
            page.screenshot(path="test_results/05_advanced.png")
            
            # ========== 7. č§æĩčŪĄå ==========

    # æąæŧ

write_device_config(mac=_resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr), capabilities=func_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            if "limit" in req.items:
                detect_tasks[task_id].update(progress=35.0, current_step="limit_test")
                mac = _resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr)
                device_id = mac.upper().replace(":", "-") if mac else "onboarding"
                limit_tester = LimitTester(client, device_id=device_id)
                limit_result = await asyncio.to_thread(limit_tester.run_all_tests)
                results["limit"] = limit_result
                detect_tasks[task_id]["progress"] = 60.0
                write_device_config(mac=mac, limits=limit_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            if "speed" in req.items:
                detect_tasks[task_id].update(progress=65.0, current_step="speed_test")
                speed_tester = SpeedTester(ctrl)
                speed_result = await asyncio.to_thread(speed_tester.run_all_tests, None, req.speed_profile)
                results["speed"] = speed_result
                detect_tasks[task_id]["progress"] = 95.0
                write_device_config(mac=_resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr), speed=speed_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            detect_tasks[task_id].update(
                status="completed",
                progress=100.0,
                current_step="completed",
                results=results,
            )
        except Exception as e:
            detect_tasks[task_id].update(status="failed", current_step=str(e), progress=0.0)

    asyncio.create_task(_run_detect())

    return {

@api_router.get("/advanced/detect/status/{task_id}", summary="č·åæĢæĩäŧŧåĄįķæ", tags=["Advanced"])
async def advanced_detect_status(task_id: str) -> dict:
    """č·åäļéŪæĢæĩäŧŧåĄčŋåšĶã"""
    task = detect_tasks.get(task_id)
    if not task:
        return {"success": False, "message": "äŧŧåĄäļå­åĻ"}
    return {
        "success": True,
        "status": task["status"],
        "progress": task.get("progress", 0.0),
        "current_step": task.get("current_step", ""),
        "completed_items": task.get("completed_items", 0),
        "total_items": task.get("total_items", 0),
        "last_result": task.get("last_result", ""),
    }

total_items = len(req.items)

            if "function" in req.items:

                detector = FunctionDetector(client)
                func_result = {}
                total_funcs = len(FUNCTION_ENDPOINTS)
                for idx, item_key in enumerate(FUNCTION_ENDPOINTS):
                    detect_tasks[task_id]["current_step"] = f"{item_key}"
                    detect_tasks[task_id]["total_items"] = total_funcs
                    func_result[item_key] = await asyncio.to_thread(detector.detect_single, item_key)
                    detect_tasks[task_id]["completed_items"] = idx + 1
                    detect_tasks[task_id]["progress"] = round(10.0 + ((idx + 1) / total_funcs) * 20.0, 1)
                    detect_tasks[task_id]["last_result"] = "pass" if func_result[item_key].get("supported", False) else "failed"
                await asyncio.to_thread(detector.restore_all)
                results["function"] = func_result
                write_device_config(mac=_resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr), capabilities=func_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            if "limit" in req.items:
                detect_tasks[task_id].update(progress=35.0, current_step="limit_test")
                mac = _resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr)
                device_id = mac.upper().replace(":", "-") if mac else "onboarding"
                limit_tester = LimitTester(client, device_id=device_id)
                limit_result = await asyncio.to_thread(limit_tester.run_all_tests)
                results["limit"] = limit_result
                detect_tasks[task_id]["progress"] = 60.0
                write_device_config(mac=mac, limits=limit_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            if "speed" in req.items:
                detect_tasks[task_id].update(progress=65.0, current_step="speed_test")
                speed_tester = SpeedTester(ctrl)
                speed_result = await asyncio.to_thread(speed_tester.run_all_tests, None, req.speed_profile)
                results["speed"] = speed_result
                detect_tasks[task_id]["progress"] = 95.0
                write_device_config(mac=_resolve_mac_from_ip(req.device_ip, ptz_mgr=mgr), speed=speed_result, ip=req.device_ip)

            detect_tasks[task_id].update(
                status="completed",
                progress=100.0,
                current_step="completed",
                results=results,
            )
        except Exception as e:
            detect_tasks[task_id].update(status="failed", current_step=str(e), progress=0.0)

čŪĐæéæ°æĢæĨ `/ws` č·ŊįąįäŧĢį ïž

# Handle jsPlugin internal WebSocket - proxy to camera (v6.41 fix)
# WASM SDK uses this path for streaming control
@app.websocket("/ws")
async def ws_internal(websocket: WebSocket):
    """WebSocket proxy for WASM SDK internal control channel."""
    log.info(f"WS /ws: ENTER, path={websocket.url.path}, qs={str(websocket.query_params)[:80]}")
    
    # Get cookies to find target camera
    ws_cookie = websocket.headers.get("cookie", "")
    camera_ip = "192.168.5.72"
    camera_ws_port = 7681
    
    for ck in ws_cookie.split(";"):
        ck = ck.strip()
        if ck.startswith("webVideoCtrlProxyWs="):
            target = ck.split("=")[1]
            parts = target.split(":")
            if len(parts) == 2:
                camera_ip = parts[0]
                camera_ws_port = int(parts[1])
    
    ws_query = str(websocket.query_params)
    camera_ws_url = f"ws://{camera_ip}:{camera_ws_port}/?{ws_query}" if ws_query else f"ws://{camera_ip}:{camera_ws_port}/"
    
    log.info(f"WS /ws: proxying to {camera_ws_url[:60]}...")
    
    try:
        await websocket.accept()
    except Exception as e:
        log.error(f"WS /ws: accept failed: {e}")

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""į įĐķæĩ·åš·åŪæđwebįŪĄįįŦŊįį æĩåæĒåŪį°"""

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import time

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080})
    
    # æåžæĩ·åš·webįŪĄįįŦŊ
    page.goto('http://192.168.5.72', timeout=30000)
    time.sleep(2)
    
    # įŧå―
    try:
        page.fill('input[name="username"]', 'admin')
    except:
        try:
            page.fill('input#username', 'admin')
        except:
            page.fill('input[type="text"]', 'admin')
    
    try:
        page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'Nftw1357')
    except:
        try:
            page.fill('input#password', 'Nftw1357')
        except:
            page.fill('input[type="password"]', 'Nftw1357')
    
    # įđåŧįŧå―æéŪ
    try:
        page.click('button[type="submit"]')
    except:
        try:
            page.click('input[type="submit"]')
        except:
            page.click('button:has-text("įŧå―")')
    
    time.sleep(5)
    
    # æŠåū
    page.screenshot(path='test_results/hikvision_after_login.png')
    print('įŧå―æåïžæŠåūå·ēäŋå­')
    
    # æĨæūéĒč§æéŪåđķįđåŧ
    try:
        page.click('text=éĒč§')
        time.sleep(2)
        page.screenshot(path='test_results/hikvision_preview.png')
        print('čŋåĨéĒč§éĄĩéĒ')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'æ æģæūå°éĒč§æéŪ: {e}')
    
    # č·åéĄĩéĒååŪđ
    print('å―åURL:', page.url)
    
    # į­åūįĻæ·æĨį
    input('æEnteråģé­æĩč§åĻ...')
    
    browser.close()

"""č·åæĩ·åš·webįŪĄįįŦŊįmain_chunk.jsååŪđ"""

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import time
import re

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080})
    
    # įīæĨč·åmain_chunk.js
    print('1. č·åmain_chunk.js...')
    page.goto('http://192.168.5.72/doc/js/main_chunk.dacc9eaf027adc526e10.js', timeout=30000)
    time.sleep(2)
    
    js_content = page.content()
    # æåJavaScriptäŧĢį 
    js_code = page.evaluate('() => document.body.textContent')
    
    print(f'  äŧĢį éŋåšĶ: {len(js_code) if js_code else 0}')
    
    # æįīĒį æĩåæĒįļåģåģéŪčŊ
    if js_code:
        print('2. æįīĒį æĩåæĒåģéŪčŊ...')
        keywords = ['StreamType', 'streamType', 'iStreamType', 'į æĩ', 'äļŧį æĩ', 'å­į æĩ', 'changeStream', 'switchStream', 'WebSocket', 'I_Start', 'I_Stop', 'RealPlay']
        
        results = {}
        for kw in keywords:
            matches = list(re.finditer(kw + '.{0,150}', js_code))
            if matches:
                results[kw] = [m.group()[:100] for m in matches[:5]]
        
        # čūåšįŧæ
        for kw, matches in results.items():
            print(f'\\n{kw} ({len(matches)}äļŠåđé):')
            for m in matches:
                print(f'  {m}')
        
        # äŋå­å°æäŧķ
        with open('test_results/hik_main_chunk.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write('=== æĩ·åš·main_chunk.jsį æĩåæĒåæ ===\\n\\n')
            for kw, matches in results.items():
                f.write(f'\\n{kw}:\\n')
                for m in matches:
                    f.write(f'  {m}\\n')
        
        print('\\nåæįŧæå·ēäŋå­å° test_results/hik_main_chunk.txt')

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""č·åæĩ·åš·webįŪĄįįŦŊäļ­WebSocketåį æĩåæĒįčŊĶįŧåŪį°"""

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import re

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080})
    
    # č·åmain_chunk.js
    page.goto('http://192.168.5.72/doc/js/main_chunk.dacc9eaf027adc526e10.js', timeout=30000)
    js_code = page.evaluate('() => document.body.textContent')
    
    # č·åroot-application_chunk.js
    page.goto('http://192.168.5.72/doc/js/root-application_chunk.c6cff51606c0c10b02c2.js', timeout=30000)
    root_js = page.evaluate('() => document.body.textContent')
    
    # æįīĒåģéŪå―æ°åŪį°
    all_code = (js_code or '') + '\n' + (root_js or '')
    
    print('1. æįīĒWebSocketčŋæĨåŪį°...')
    # č·åWebSocketæåŧšURLįäŧĢį ïžæīéŋįäļäļæïž
    ws_matches = list(re.finditer('WebSocket\(.{0,500}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(ws_matches[:3]):
        print(f'  WebSocket {i+1}: {m.group()[:200]}')
    
    print('\n2. æįīĒStartRealPlayåŪį°...')
    rp_matches = list(re.finditer('[SJ]S_StartRealPlay.{0,300}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(rp_matches[:3]):
        print(f'  StartRealPlay {i+1}: {m.group()[:200]}')
    
    print('\n3. æįīĒį æĩåæĒå―æ°...')
    stream_matches = list(re.finditer('change[Ss]tream.{0,500}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(stream_matches[:5]):
        print(f'  changeStream {i+1}: {m.group()[:200]}')
    
    # äđæįīĒ switchStream å setStreamType
    for kw in ['switchStream', 'setStreamType', 'StreamChange']:
        matches = list(re.finditer(kw + '.{0,200}', all_code))
        if matches:
            print(f'\n  {kw} ({len(matches)}äļŠåđé):')
            for m in matches[:2]:
                print(f'    {m.group()[:150]}')
    
    print('\n4. æįīĒJS_StartRealPlayįå·ä―åæ°...')
    # č·åååŦiStreamTypeįæ­æūå―æ°
    play_matches = list(re.finditer('StartRealPlay.{0,500}iStreamType.{0,200}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(play_matches[:3]):
        print(f'  Play {i+1}: {m.group()[:250]}')
    
    # ååæįīĒïžiStreamType -> StartRealPlay
    play_matches2 = list(re.finditer('iStreamType.{0,300}StartRealPlay', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(play_matches2[:3]):
        print(f'  Play2 {i+1}: {m.group()[:250]}')
    
    print('\n5. æįīĒWebSocketč·Ŋåūæåŧš...')
    # æįīĒ /webSocketVideoCtrlProxy æįąŧäžžįč·Ŋåū
    proxy_matches = list(re.finditer('webSocket.{0,200}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(proxy_matches[:5]):
        print(f'  webSocket {i+1}: {m.group()[:150]}')
    
    # æįīĒproxyAddress
    proxy_addr = list(re.finditer('proxyAddress.{0,300}', all_code))
    for i, m in enumerate(proxy_addr[:3]):
        print(f'  proxyAddress {i+1}: {m.group()[:200]}')
    
    # äŋå­åŪæīåæ
    with open('test_results/hik_stream_analysis.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('=== æĩ·åš·webįŪĄįįŦŊį æĩåæĒčŊĶįŧåæ ===\n\n')
        
        f.write('--- WebSocketčŋæĨ ---\n')
        for m in ws_matches[:5]:
            f.write(m.group()[:300] + '\n\n')
        
        f.write('\n--- StartRealPlay ---\n')
        for m in rp_matches[:5]:
            f.write(m.group()[:300] + '\n\n')
        
        f.write('\n--- changeStream ---\n')
        for m in stream_matches[:5]:
            f.write(m.group()[:300] + '\n\n')
        
        f.write('\n--- webSocketč·Ŋåū ---\n')
        for m in proxy_matches[:5]:
            f.write(m.group()[:200] + '\n\n')
    
    print('\nčŊĶįŧåæå·ēäŋå­å° test_results/hik_stream_analysis.txt')
    
    browser.close()

content.text: čŪĐæčŊŧåæ ļåŋæäŧķæĨįč§Ģå―åįåŪį°ïž

"""
M3 Stream Service - č§éĒæĩįŪĄį (Wave 4)

åŪį°:
1. RTSPæĩå°åč§Ģæ - ISAPIč·åRTSP URL, æŊæH264/H265įžį 
2. č§éĒæĩčŋæĨåæ­æū - čŋæĨéŠčŊ, įķæč·čļŠ, åĪč·Ŋæĩåđķå
3. æŠåūåč― - äŧRTSPæĩæŠåå―ååļ§, äŋå­JPEGå°download/image/
4. 60į§č§éĒå―åķ - å―åķå°download/
5. 3åž åūåéīééé

Author: éįåž @åæđåĪĐæ
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import os
import re
import socket
import subprocess
import time
import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Any

from src.stream.constants import (
    DOWNLOAD_DIR,
    DOWNLOAD_IMAGE_DIR,
    RTSP_DEFAULT_PORT,
    RTSP_HIKVISION_CHANNELS,
    RTSP_HIKVISION_TEMPLATE,
    RTSP_URL_PATTERN,
    SCREENSHOT_FORMAT,
    SCREENSHOT_QUALITY,
    SCREENSHOT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT,
)

from src.stream.core.logger import LOG


# ================================================================== #
#  1. RTSPæĩå°åč§Ģæ
# ================================================================== #

class RtspUrlParser:
    """RTSP URLč§ĢæåĻã

    č§Ģææ åRTSP URLæ žåž:
    - rtsp://ip:port/Streaming/Channels/{channel}
    - rtsp://user:pass@ip:port/path

    æŊæHikvisionæ žåžURLæĻĄæŋįæã
    """

    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self._pattern = re.compile(RTSP_URL_PATTERN, re.IGNORECASE)

    def parse(self, url: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """č§ĢæRTSP URLïžčŋåįŧæåå­æŪĩã

        Args:
            url: åŪæīRTSP URLå­įŽĶäļē

        Returns:
            įŧæåå­åļ: protocol/username/password/host/port/path
            éæģæ žåžčŋå {"error": "č§ĢæéčŊŊ"}
        """
        match = self._pattern.match(url.strip())
        if not match:
            return {"error": "éæģRTSP URLæ žåž", "url": url}

        groups = match.groupdict()

        protocol = url.split("://")[0].lower() if "://" in url else "rtsp"
        host = groups.get("host", "")
        port = int(groups["port"]) if groups.get("port") else RTSP_DEFAULT_PORT
        path = groups.get("path", "/")
        username = groups.get("username", "")
        password = groups.get("password", "")

        if not host:
            return {"error": "įžšå°hostå­æŪĩ", "url": url}

        # æĢæĩįžį įąŧå
        codec = self._detect_codec_from_path(path)

        return {
            "protocol": protocol,
            "username": username,
            "password": password,
            "host": host,
            "port": port,
            "path": path,
            "codec": codec,
        }

    @staticmethod
    def _detect_codec_from_path(path: str) -> str:
        """äŧURLč·ŊåūæĢæĩįžį įąŧå (H264 vs H265)ã"""
        # Hikvision: 101/102 = H264, 201/202 = H265
        channel_match = re.search(r"/Channels/(\d)", path)
        if channel_match:
            series = channel_match.group(1)
            return "h264" if series == "1" else "h265" if series == "2" else "unknown"
        return "unknown"

    def build_hikvision_url(
        self,
        ip: str,
        port: int = RTSP_DEFAULT_PORT,
        channel: int = 101,
    ) -> str:
        """æåŧšHikvision RTSP URLã

        Args:
            ip: čŪūåĪIPå°å
            port: RTSPįŦŊåĢ (éŧčŪĪ554)
            channel: ééå· (101=H264äļŧį æĩ, 102=H264å­į æĩ, 201=H265äļŧį æĩ, 202=H265å­į æĩ)

        Returns:
            åŪæīRTSP URL
        """
        return RTSP_HIKVISION_TEMPLATE.format(
            ip=ip,
            port=port,
            channel=channel,
        )

    def get_available_streams(self, ip: str, port: int = RTSP_DEFAULT_PORT) -> list[dict]:
        """č·ååŊįĻįæĩURLåčĄĻã

        Args:
            ip: čŪūåĪIPå°å
            port: RTSPįŦŊåĢ

        Returns:
            åŊįĻįæĩURLåčĄĻ
        """
        streams = []
        for channel_num, channel_path in RTSP_HIKVISION_CHANNELS.items():
            url = f"rtsp://{ip}:{port}/{channel_path}"
            codec = self._detect_codec_from_path(f"/{channel_path}")
            stream_type = "main" if str(channel_num).endswith("1") else "sub"
            streams.append({
                "url": url,
                "channel": channel_num,
                "codec": codec,
                "stream_type": stream_type,
                "path": f"/{channel_path}",
            })
        return streams


# ================================================================== #
#  2. č§éĒæĩčŋæĨåæ­æū
# ================================================================== #

class StreamConnectionState:
    """æĩčŋæĨįķææäļūã"""
    CONNECTING = "connecting"
    CONNECTED = "connected"
    DISCONNECTED = "disconnected"
    ERROR = "error"


class StreamSession:
    """åäļŠRTSPæĩäžčŊã"""

    def __init__(self, stream_url: str, stream_id: str = "") -> None:
        self.stream_id = stream_id or str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
        self.stream_url = stream_url
        self.state = StreamConnectionState.DISCONNECTED
        self.connected_at: float = 0
        self.error: str = ""
        self.metadata: dict[str, Any] = {}

    def mark_connected(self) -> None:
        self.state = StreamConnectionState.CONNECTED
        self.connected_at = time.time()
        self.error = ""

    def mark_disconnected(self) -> None:
        self.state = StreamConnectionState.DISCONNECTED
        self.connected_at = 0

    def mark_error(self, error: str) -> None:
        self.state = StreamConnectionState.ERROR
        self.error = error

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        return {
            "stream_id": self.stream_id,
            "stream_url": self.stream_url,
            "state": self.state,
            "connected_at": datetime.fromtimestamp(self.connected_at).isoformat() if self.connected_at else None,
            "error": self.error,
            "metadata": self.metadata,
        }


class StreamPool:
    """RTSPæĩčŋæĨæą  - æŊæåĪč·Ŋæĩåđķåã"""

    def __init__(self, max_streams: int = 16) -> None:
        self._streams: dict[str, StreamSession] = {}
        self._max_streams = max_streams

    @property
    def active_count(self) -> int:
        return sum(
            1 for s in self._streams.values()
            if s.state == StreamConnectionState.CONNECTED
        )

    def add(self, stream_url: str, stream_id: str = "") -> StreamSession:
        """æ·ŧå æ°æĩäžčŊã"""
        if len(self._streams) >= self._max_streams:
            raise RuntimeError(f"æĩčŋæĨæ°å·ēčūūäļé: {self._max_streams}")

        session = StreamSession(stream_url, stream_id)
        self._streams[session.stream_id] = session
        return session

    def get(self, stream_id: str) -> StreamSession | None:
        return self._streams.get(stream_id)

    def remove(self, stream_id: str) -> bool:
        session = self._streams.pop(stream_id, None)
        if session:
            session.mark_disconnected()
            return True
        return False

    def list_all(self) -> list[dict]:
        return [s.to_dict() for s in self._streams.values()]


class RtspConnector:
    """RTSPæĩčŋæĨåĻã

    čŋæĨRTSPæĩåđķéŠčŊåŊčūūæ§ã
    č·åæĩįķæïžčŋæĨ/æ­åž/éčŊŊïžã
    æŊæåĪč·Ŋæĩåđķåã
    """

    def __init__(self, timeout: int = 10) -> None:
        self._pool = StreamPool()
        self._timeout = timeout

    @property
    def pool(self) -> StreamPool:
        return self._pool

    async def connect(self, stream_url: str, stream_id: str = "") -> dict:
        """čŋæĨRTSPæĩåđķéŠčŊåŊčūūã

        Args:
            stream_url: RTSPæĩå°å
            stream_id: æĩæ čŊ (åŊéïžčŠåĻįæ)

        Returns:
            {"success": True, "stream_id": "...", "state": "connected"}
            {"success": False, "error": "..."}
        """
        session = self._pool.add(stream_url, stream_id)
        session.state = StreamConnectionState.CONNECTING

        try:
            # ä―ŋįĻffmpegæĒæĩæĩæŊåĶåŊčūū
            loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
            reachable = await loop.run_in_executor(
                None,
                self._probe_stream,
                stream_url,
                self._timeout,
            )

            if reachable:
                session.mark_connected()
                session.metadata = self._get_stream_info(stream_url)
                LOG.done(f"RTSPæĩå·ēčŋæĨ: {session.stream_id} | {stream_url}")
                return {
                    "success": True,
                    "stream_id": session.stream_id,
                    "state": StreamConnectionState.CONNECTED,
                    "metadata": session.metadata,
                }
            else:
                session.mark_error("æĩäļåŊčūū")
                self._pool.remove(session.stream_id)
                return {
                    "success": False,
                    "error": f"RTSPæĩäļåŊčūū: {stream_url}",
                }

        except Exception as e:
            session.mark_error(str(e))
            self._pool.remove(session.stream_id)
            return {"success": False, "error": f"čŋæĨåžåļļ: {e}"}

    def disconnect(self, stream_id: str) -> dict:
        """æ­åžæĩčŋæĨã"""
        if self._pool.remove(stream_id):
            LOG.info(f"æĩå·ēæ­åž: {stream_id}")
            return {"success": True, "stream_id": stream_id}
        return {"success": False, "error": f"æĩäļå­åĻ: {stream_id}"}

    def get_status(self, stream_id: str) -> dict:
        """č·åæĩįķæã"""
        session = self._pool.get(stream_id)
        if session is None:
            return {"success": False, "error": f"æĩäļå­åĻ: {stream_id}"}
        return {"success": True, **session.to_dict()}

    def list_streams(self) -> list[dict]:
        """č·åæææĩįķæã"""
        return self._pool.list_all()

    @staticmethod
    def _probe_stream(url: str, timeout: int) -> bool:
        """æĒæĩRTSPæĩæŊåĶåŊčūūã

        ä―ŋįĻffmpegåŋŦéæĒæĩæĩæŊåĶå­åĻäļåŊæ­æūã
        äļåŪéč§Ģį ïžäŧæĒæĩæĩäŋĄæŊã
        """
        cmd = [
            "ffmpeg",
            "-rtsp_transport", "tcp",
            "-timeout", str(timeout * 1000000),  # microseconds
            "-probesize", "32768",
            "-analyzeduration", "0",
            "-i", url,
            "-t", "0",  # 0į§: åŠæĒæĩäļč§Ģį 
            "-f", "null",
            "-",
        ]

        try:
            proc = subprocess.Popen(
                cmd,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
                stdin=subprocess.DEVNULL,
            )
            _stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=timeout + 5)
            # ffmpegčŋåį 0æ1é―æåŊč―(ååģäš- t 0), åģéŪįstderräļ­æŊåĶææĩäŋĄæŊ
            stderr_text = stderr.decode("utf-8", errors="ignore").lower()
            # åĶææ"could not"æ"error"äļæēĄæ"stream #"ïžéåļļäļåŊčūū
            if "could not" in stderr_text and "stream" not in stderr_text:
                return False
            if "invalid data" in stderr_text:
                return False
            return True
        except (subprocess.TimeoutExpired, FileNotFoundError, Exception):
            return False

    @staticmethod
    def _get_stream_info(url: str) -> dict:
        """č·åæĩåæ°æŪïžįžį ãåčūĻįį­ïžã"""
        cmd = [
            "ffprobe",
            "-v", "quiet",
            "-print_format", "json",
            "-show_streams",
            "-show_format",
            url,
        ]

        try:
            proc = subprocess.Popen(
                cmd,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
                stdin=subprocess.DEVNULL,
            )
            stdout, _ = proc.communicate(timeout=10)
            import json
            info = json.loads(stdout.decode("utf-8"))

            streams = info.get("streams", [])
            result: dict[str, Any] = {"streams_count": len(streams)}

            for s in streams:
                if s.get("codec_type") == "video":
                    result["video_codec"] = s.get("codec_name", "unknown")
                    result["resolution"] = f"{s.get('width', 0)}x{s.get('height', 0)}"
                    result["fps"] = s.get("r_frame_rate", "unknown")
                elif s.get("codec_type") == "audio":
                    result["audio_codec"] = s.get("codec_name", "none")

            return result

        except Exception:
            return {"error": "æ æģč·åæĩäŋĄæŊ"}

class ScreenshotCapture:
    """äŧRTSPæĩæŠåå―ååļ§ã

    äŋå­äļšJPEGå°download/image/ã
    éŠčŊæäŧķåĪ§å°>0äļåŊæåžã

        except Exception as e:
            return {"success": False, "error": f"å―åķåžåļļ: {e}"}

    def stop_recording(self, stream_id: str) -> dict:
        """æåĻåæ­Ēå―åķã"""
        record = self._active.pop(stream_id, None)
        if record is None:
            return {"success": False, "error": f"å―åķäŧŧåĄäļå­åĻ: {stream_id}"}

        proc = record["process"]
        try:
            proc.terminate()
            proc.wait(timeout=10)
        except Exception:
            try:
                proc.kill()
            except Exception:
                pass

        filepath = record.get("filepath", "")
        file_size = 0
        if os.path.exists(filepath):
            file_size = os.path.getsize(filepath)

        return {
            "success": True,
            "stream_id": stream_id,
            "filepath": filepath,
            "size_bytes": file_size,
        }

    @staticmethod
    def _verify_video(filepath: str) -> bool:
        """éŠčŊč§éĒæäŧķæŊåĶåŊæ­æū (ä―ŋįĻffprobe)ã"""
        cmd = [
            "ffprobe",
            "-v", "error",
            "-show_format",
            "-show_streams",
            filepath,
        ]

        try:
            proc = subprocess.Popen(
                cmd,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
                stdin=subprocess.DEVNULL,
            )
            _stdout, stderr = proc.communicate(timeout=10)
            # ffprobečŋå0čĄĻįĪšææ
            return proc.returncode == 0
        except Exception:
            return False

class IntervalCapture:
    """éīéééåĪåž åūåã

    äŧRTSPæĩéīééé3åž åūåã
    äŋå­äļšJPEGå°download/image/ã
    éŠčŊæŊåž æäŧķåĪ§å°>0äļåŊæåžã
    """

    def __init__(self, output_dir: str | None = None) -> None:
        self._screenshot = ScreenshotCapture(output_dir)

    def capture_sequence(
        self,
        stream_url: str,
        count: int = 3,
        interval_seconds: float = 2.0,
        stream_id: str = "",
    ) -> dict:
        """éīééécountåž åūåã

        Args:
            stream_url: RTSPæĩå°å
            count: ééæ°é (éŧčŪĪ3)
            interval_seconds: éééīé(į§, éŧčŪĪ2.0)
            stream_id: æĩæ čŊ

        Returns:

        if not stream_id:

        images: list[dict] = []

        for i in range(count):
            # äļšæŊåž åūåįæåŊäļstream_id
            frame_id = f"{stream_id}_frame{i+1}"
            LOG.info(f"ééįŽŽ {i+1}/{count} åž åūå...")

            result = self._screenshot.capture(stream_url, stream_id=frame_id)

            if result.get("success"):
                images.append({
                    "frame_number": i + 1,
                    "filepath": result["filepath"],
                    "file_size": result["file_size"],
                    "verified": result.get("verified", False),
                    "elapsed_ms": result.get("elapsed_ms", 0),
                })
                total_size += result["file_size"]
            else:
                return {
                    "success": False,
                    "error": f"įŽŽ{i+1}åž åūåééåĪąčīĨ: {result.get('error')}",
                    "captured_count": len(images),
                    "images": images,
                }

            # éīéį­åū (æåäļåž äļéčĶį­åū)
            if i < count - 1 and interval_seconds > 0:
                time.sleep(interval_seconds)

        LOG.done(f"éīéééåŪæ: {count}åž  | æŧåĪ§å°={total_size}B | {stream_id}")

        return {
            "success": True,
            "stream_id": stream_id,
            "count": len(images),
            "images": images,
            "total_size": total_size,
        }
